L2().details: Sets up the L2 contracts. Depends on `L1()` being called first.

disableUpgradedFork().details: Disables upgrade mode for testing. By default the fork testing env will be upgraded to the latest      implementation. This can be used to disable the upgrade which, is useful for tests targeting the upgrade      process itself.

enableAltDA().details: Enables alternative data availability mode for testing

returnIfForkTest(string).details: Returns early when running against a forked production network. Useful for allowing a portion of a test      to run.

skipIfCoverage().details: Skips tests when running in coverage mode.

skipIfForkTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network.

skipIfOpsRepoTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network using the superchain ops repo.

testFuzz_dependencySetSize_succeeds(uint.details: Tests that the dependency set size is correct when adding an arbitrary number of chain IDs.

testFuzz_isInDependencySet_dependencySet.details: Tests that `isInDependencySet` returns false when the dependency set is empty.

testFuzz_isInDependencySet_notDependency.details: Tests that `isInDependencySet` reverts when the input chain ID is not in the dependency set      and is not the chain's chain ID.

testFuzz_isInDependencySet_succeeds(uint.details: Tests that an arbitrary chain ID can be added to the dependency set.

testFuzz_setConfig_addDependencyButNotDe.details: Tests that setting the add dependency config as not the depositor reverts.

testFuzz_setConfig_addDependency_succeed.details: Tests that the config for adding a dependency can be set.

testFuzz_setConfig_removeDependencyButNo.details: Tests that setting the remove dependency config for a chain ID that is not in the dependency set reverts.
Tests that setting the remove dependency config as not the depositor reverts.

testFuzz_setConfig_removeDependency_succ.details: Tests that the config for removing a dependency can be set.

test_dependencySetSize_dependencySetEmpt.details: Tests that the dependency set size is correct when the dependency set is empty.

test_isDeposit_notCrossL2Inbox_reverts(a.details: Tests that `isDeposit` reverts if the caller is not the cross L2 inbox.

test_isDeposit_succeeds().details: Tests that `isDeposit` always returns the correct value.

test_isInDependencySet_chainChainId_succ.details: Tests that `isInDependencySet` returns true when the chain's chain ID is passed as the input.

test_setConfig_addDependencyButAlreadyDe.details: Tests that adding a dependency already in the set reverts

test_setConfig_addDependencyButChainChai.details: Tests that adding a dependency reverts if it's the chain's chain id

test_setConfig_addDependencyButDependenc.details: Tests that setting the add dependency config when the dependency set size is too large reverts.

test_setConfig_removeDependencyButChainC.details: Tests that setting the remove dependency config for the chain's chain ID reverts.

artifacts().notice: The address of the Artifacts contract. Set into state by Deployer.setUp() with `etch` to avoid         mutating any nonces. MUST not have constructor logic.

isForkTest().notice: Indicates whether a test is running against a forked production network.
